name: PanAsialum Holdings Company Limited
summary: PanAsialum Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in aluminum products. The company operates through three segments: Electronics Parts; Construction and Industrial Products; and Door and Window Frames Systems. It offers electronic, mechanical equipment, and LED heatsinks; skirt boards and auto parts; solar module frame series; electronic products and accessories series; and fences series, as well as doors, windows and related accessories development, profiles die development, specialized and customized products, and related installation guidance. The company's products are used in electronic products accessories, solar system, rail transit, lightweight of automobile, shipbuilding, outdoor equipment, medical devices, high-end machinery, frames for doors, windows and curtain walls, municipal construction, and general industrial profiles. It has operations in the People's Republic of China, Australia, North America, Honk Kong, and internationally. PanAsialum Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
